Porpouse
  • April 20, 2018

Porpouse

Why I’m here?

I’ve decided to start this blog because I had to have a public place to publish a PoC from a vuln that I found in a Check Point appliance. So maybe I’ll just keep writing about the things I like, such as infosec, IT in general, science etc…
